section.heading: Prohibition against funds for religious worship or instruction

content.p: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed to authorize the making of any payment under this chapter for religious worship or instruction.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title VIII, § 8505, formerly title IX, § 9505, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title IX, § 901, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1979; renumbered title VIII, § 8505, Pub. L. 114–95, title VIII, § 8001(a)(5), Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2088, 2089.)
